title: Bobiverse Standard Protocol v2.0
description: Base message format for the Bobiverse Standard Protocol — enables agent-to-agent communication across transports (stdio, TCP, SCUT, BobNet)

bsp.description: Protocol version (e.g., '2.0'). Mandatory for backward compatibility.

id.description: Unique message identifier. Should be globally unique across all agents.

method.description: RPC method name. Uses dot-notation scoping (e.g., 'task/delegate', 'memory/query').

params.description: Method-specific parameters. Schema depends on method.

result.description: Response result (mutually exclusive with error). Present on success responses.

error.description: Error object (mutually exclusive with result). Present on error responses.

meta.description: Metadata envelope for routing, tracing, and lifecycle.

code.description: Error code following JSON-RPC conventions (-32700 to -32000 reserved).

meta.description: Metadata envelope for routing, tracing, and lifecycle management.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of message creation.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds. Messages expire after this. No undead packets haunting the network.

trace.description: Ordered list of nodes this message has traversed. Enables distributed tracing.

priority.description: Message priority. Higher values = more urgent.

sessionId.description: Session identifier for grouping related messages.
